title: Hackadoll the Animation - Episode 12 - Magical Girl Lovely Hurt♥
content: It's a pleasant Sunday morning. The Hackadolls are summoned to help out the ever iconic "magical girls" kids love so much, but the magical girls and monsters in this town are not what you'd expect. The Hackadolls face what might be their hardest challenge yet.
author: Crunchyroll

title: Hackadoll the Animation - Episode 11 - VA Police, Move Out!
content: The Hackadolls research the perfect present for a fan to give his favorite VA at her birthday event. When the special day arrives, the Hackadoll's client decides to personally deliver the painstakingly acquired present...
author: Crunchyroll
